artifact_classification: authoritative for bounded S10R-006-R4-A option selection only
decision_subject: authority to prepare a separate bounded lane-to-H_v coupling-rule contract

options.label: Bounded Coupling-Rule Design Route
options.candidate_rule: Accept the approved R3 symbolic method as sufficient interpretation authority to prepare, under a later separately approved task, one bounded lane-to-H_v coupling-rule contract.
later_contract_requirements: declare one exact abstract boundary parameter, orientation, domain, and endpoint convention
identify every proposed per-lane parameter interval explicitly
label every proposed relation as interpretation rather than source evidence or physical placement
preserve all cross-lane, cross-view, top/upright, closure, and implementation stops
stop before any parameter value or coordinate is instantiated
options.future_authority_if_selected: preparation only of a separate bounded lane-to-H_v coupling-rule contract
known_risks: Any later interval or orientation would be interpretation rather than recovered physical source placement.
A mathematically complete mapping could still be physically wrong.
Lane intervals could imply seams or closure unless a later contract explicitly forbids those effects.
A later rule could overstate symbolic rank as angular or arc evidence.
options.artifact_classification: authoritative selected bounded preparation route only

options.label: Preserve Coupling Block
options.candidate_rule: Do not authorize preparation of a coupling-rule contract; retain the approved R3 symbolic method within its uncoupled scope until new source authority or another separately approved Blueprint rule exists.
known_risks: A005 cannot advance toward a coupled transition interpretation until new authority is supplied.

selection_record.approval_context: Direct response to the evidence-based recommendation of S10R-006-R4-A over S10R-006-R4-BLOCK.
selection_record.authority_granted: preparation only of a separate bounded lane-to-H_v coupling-rule contract
